orcamento.return_by: I would like a reply by:
orcamento.recaptcha: We are verifying security with reCAPTCHA, this may take a few seconds. Thank you for your patience.
orcamento.sent: Form sent, now just wait for our contact!
orcamento.desc1: Thank you sincerely for your interest in our catamarans.
orcamento.desc2: We are committed to offering an exceptional experience, adapted to your specific needs, finding the tailored solution for you.
orcamento.desc3: After receiving your form, we will contact you to offer a personalized quote.
orcamento.custom_desc: Choose options and configure your boat!

custom.title: Customize Your Catamaran
custom.fill_form: Fill out and send the form
custom.sent: Form sent, wait for our representative to return.
custom.desc1: Here, you can select the desired options for each model, view available engines and send this selection to one of our sales representatives, who will continue the service.
custom.desc2: After sending, we will contact you to present all details and proceed with the project negotiation.
custom.desc3: If you have any questions, you can get faster service here:
custom.simple_quote_desc: Click here for a simpler version of this form...
